items.title: Trump threatens to remove all US troops from Europe
items.description: US president revives calls for his country to take over Greenland

items.title: Nigel Farage quits as MP to force by-election
items.description: Tories and Labour refuse to participate in contest as Reform UK leader denies wrongdoing over donations

items.title: Disney accuses US media regulator of trying ‘to sit in the editor’s chair’
items.description: Media giant claims FCC investigation into talk show ‘The View’ could violate First Amendment of American constitution

items.title: Trump signals reversal of Turkey F-35 ban
items.description: US president strikes friendlier tone with Turkish counterpart than Nato allies

items.title: French far-right leader Le Pen cleared to run for president
items.description: Appeals court shortens sentence for embezzlement but she must now decide whether to run

items.title: Monaco bombing suspect shot dead in Kyiv
items.description: Ukrainian authorities say intelligence officer confessed to paying and killing Anastasia Berezovska

items.title: Trump and the Fifa debacle
items.description: The US president is the first leader since Benito Mussolini in 1934 to intervene publicly in his team’s favour

items.title: Burnham warned of ‘unsustainable’ public finances by UK fiscal watchdog
items.description: Office for Budget Responsibility’s annual report says urgent action is needed to cut spending

items.title: How Europe would fight without America
items.description: As Nato meets, the continent is starting to think about how to defend itself without the US
